EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITime

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Time.

[Guid("66810D21-8DE0-44EE-B26E-465AC09F161F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITime

Properties

Day

The time's gregorian day.

short Day { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

Hour

The time's hour.

short Hour { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Sample Snippet

Minute

The time's minute.

short Minute { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

Month

The time's gregorian month.

short Month { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Nanoseconds

The time's nanoseconds.

int Nanoseconds { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Sample Snippet

Second

The time's second.

short Second { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Examples

Sample Snippet

Year

The time's gregorian year.

short Year { get; set; }

Property Value

short

Methods

Compare(ITime) 

int Compare(ITime otherTime)

Parameters

otherTime ITime

Returns

int

QueryDayFraction()

The time's time portion as a day fraction. Corresponds to the Hour, Minute, Second, and Nanoseconds properties.

double QueryDayFraction()

Returns

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryGregorianTime()

Obtains the time as a gregorian date and time.

WKSDateTime QueryGregorianTime()

Returns

WKSDateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryIntegerTime(esriIntegerTimeFormat)

Obtains the time as an integer time.

long QueryIntegerTime(esriIntegerTimeFormat integerTimeFormat)

Parameters

integerTimeFormat esriIntegerTimeFormat

Returns

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryJulianDayNumber()

The Time's date portion as a julian (Julius Scaliger) day number. Corresponds to the Year, Month, and Day properties.

int QueryJulianDayNumber()

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryNanosecondsSinceMidnight()

The time's time portion as the number of nanoseconds elapsed since midnight. Corresponds to the Hour, Minute, Second, and Nanoseconds properties.

long QueryNanosecondsSinceMidnight()

Returns

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryOleTime()

Obtains the time as an OLE automation date object.

DateTime QueryOleTime()

Returns

DateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryTicks()

Obtains the time as the number of ticks since January 1, 0001 AD (Anno Domini).

long QueryTicks()

Returns

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryTimeString(esriTimeStringFormat)

Obtains the time as a string, based on the given time string format.

string QueryTimeString(esriTimeStringFormat timeStringFormat)

Parameters

timeStringFormat esriTimeStringFormat

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryTimeStringCurrentLocale(esriTimeLocaleFormat)

Obtains the time as a string, based on the current locale.

string QueryTimeStringCurrentLocale(esriTimeLocaleFormat timeLocaleFormat)

Parameters

timeLocaleFormat esriTimeLocaleFormat

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryTimeStringCustom(string, int, string, string)

Obtains the time as a string, based on the given custom time string format, and locale properties.

string QueryTimeStringCustom(string timeStringFormat, int LocaleID, string amSymbol, string pmSymbol)

Parameters

timeStringFormat string
LocaleID int
amSymbol string
pmSymbol string

Returns

string

string QueryXMLTimeString(ITimeReference TimeReference)

Parameters

TimeReference ITimeReference

Returns

string

SetDayFraction(double)

The time's time portion as a day fraction. Corresponds to the Hour, Minute, Second, and Nanoseconds properties.

void SetDayFraction(double dayFraction)

Parameters

dayFraction double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetFromCurrentLocalTime()

Writes the time to the current date and time on this machine, expressed as the local time.

void SetFromCurrentLocalTime()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetFromCurrentUtcTime()

Writes the time to the current date and time on this machine, expressed as the Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

void SetFromCurrentUtcTime()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetFromGregorianTime(ref WKSDateTime)

Obtains the time from a given gregorian date and time value.

void SetFromGregorianTime(ref WKSDateTime gregorianTime)

Parameters

gregorianTime WKSDateTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetFromIntegerTime(esriIntegerTimeFormat, long)

Writes the time from an integer time.

void SetFromIntegerTime(esriIntegerTimeFormat integerTimeFormat, long integerTime)

Parameters

integerTimeFormat esriIntegerTimeFormat
integerTime long

Writes the time from a variant object.

oleTime DateTime

Sample Snippet

Writes the time from a given number of ticks since January 1, 0001 AD (Anno Domini) value.

ticks long

SetFromTimeString(esriTimeStringFormat, string)

timeString string

timeString string

SetNanosecondsSinceMidnight(long)

The time's time portion as the number of nanoseconds elapsed since midnight. Corresponds to the Hour, Minute, Second, and Nanoseconds properties.

void SetNanosecondsSinceMidnight(long nanosecondsSinceMidnight)

nanosecondsSinceMidnight long

SnapToEndOfMonth()

Adjust the day value, to the last day in the current month and year.

void SnapToEndOfMonth()

Parameters

Time ITime

Returns

ITimeDuration

ToLocal()

Converts the time from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) value to local (to this machine) time.

void ToLocal()

Examples

Sample Snippet

ToUTC()

Converts the time from local (to this machine) time value to Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).

void ToUTC()

Examples
